title: Boryangraecum sacciferum
taxonomy: Boryangraecum sacciferum is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It is a member of the subfamily Epidendroideae and tribe Coelogyneae. The genus Boryangraecum is a small group of orchids endemic to Madagascar. The classification of Boryangraecum sacciferum reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history. Further research is needed to fully understand the classification and relationships of this species.
